title: ranunculus rubellus
intro: Ranunculus rubellus, also known as small-flowered buttercup, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ranunculus rubellus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and promoting healing. Traditionally, the roots are prepared in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
